symptom_description: Idler roller completely seized (`0 RPM rotation`). Conveyor belt sliding across stationary steel shell (`extreme` flat spot worn into roller and hot rubber smell).
root_cause: Incorrect bearing tolerance (`0.011`) led to inner race spinning on the shaft, causing friction welding and bearing lockup.
action_taken: Replaced seized rollers (`Spec-340`), installed deflector shields (`P/N 2038-C`) to prevent washdown water entry, and verified tracking.
parts_used: CEMA E Rollers, Water Deflector Shields, Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Belt running `4.4 inches` off-center at tail pulley return idlers. Rubbing noise (`growling`) and persistent smell of hot rubber (`68 ppm` VOCs) near take-up assembly.
root_cause: Material buildup (`0.10 inch` sticky wet clay/bulk product) frozen or caked onto head pulley and return idler rolls, creating uneven diameter and forcing belt to track to one side.
action_taken: Locked out conveyor, manually scraped and cleaned hardened material buildup (`6.8 lbs`) from head pulley and return idlers, adjusted take-up screw tension equally (`65 ft-lbs` torque), and test ran belt to track center.
parts_used: Self-Aligning Training Idlers (Set of 3), Return Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Thermal inspection (`IR gun`) showed seized return idler bearing reaching `124`°C. Sparks visible (`slight` hazard) under dark operating conditions.
root_cause: Normal fatigue failure and spalling of internal idler ball bearings after exceeding `10` hours of continuous operating life under heavy impact loading.
action_taken: Replaced 4 seized return idlers (`P/N 3312-A`) and 2 impact bed idlers under transfer point, cleared spilled material (`5.8 lbs`) from under structure, and verified smooth, quiet rotation.
parts_used: Heavy-Duty Impact Troughing Idler Assemblies (Set of 2), Return Rollers (4-Pack), Idler Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Ops reported top cover rubber delaminating (`extreme` separation) and severe edge gouging along `2.9 ft` of conveyor belt carrying surface.
root_cause: Sharp piece of tramp metal (`P/N 2454-C`) or structural steel bracket broke off and wedged between skirt board and belt surface at loading chute, gouging belt during transit.
action_taken: Locked out unit, trimmed frayed belt edges, repaired 4-foot longitudinal top cover gouge using cold-cure urethane repair compound (`Spec-562`) and rubber repair strips, and readjusted skirt board clamps.
parts_used: Cold-Cure Urethane Belt Repair Compound Kit (2 Packs), Heavy-Duty Rubber Patch Strips, Urethane Skirt Board Sealing Rubber (20ft)

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted (`132°C`), discharging coupling oil (`33%` pool on floor).
root_cause: Conveyor overloaded beyond maximum design capacity (`surge loading from upstream bin discharge exceeding 47% TPH`).
action_taken: Cleared excess surge material load (`5.6 lbs`) from belt carrying surface, freed up 6 jammed idler rollers under skirt board, reset motor thermal overload relay, and verified normal running draw (`111 Amps`).
parts_used: Fluid Coupling Thermal Fuse Plug 140°C, ISO VG 32 Fluid Coupling Oil (2 Gallons), Replacement Return Idlers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Conveyor stalled completely during heavy surge loading. Fluid coupling thermal fuse plug melted (`110°C`), discharging coupling oil (`68%` pool on floor).
root_cause: Severe mechanical binding and increased drag (`141 ft-lbs` required) caused by multiple seized idler rollers and caked material dragging against bottom belt return span.
action_taken: Shoveled out heavy material spillage (`1.6 lbs`) burying tail pulley and return belt span, replaced 4 locked-up return idlers (`Spec-396`), refilled fluid coupling with fresh ISO VG 32 oil (`72 lbs gal`), and installed new thermal fuse plug.
parts_used: Replacement Return Idlers (Set of 6), Motor Terminal Lug Kit

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`minor` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`chattering` squealing sound and rubber dust). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit MOTOR-601.
root_cause: Failed return idler bearings on one side (`56%` seized) causing asymmetric drag on the belt.
action_taken: Modified feed chute diverter plate (`progressive` angle) to center load, replaced `P/N 1536-REV2` worn return rollers, and installed edge trackers.
parts_used: Deflector Plate Steel, Return Idler Assemblies, Edge Tracker Kit

symptom_description: Conveyor belt mistracking severely (`sharp` off-center toward right side). Belt edge rubbing against steel conveyor frame (`grinding` squealing sound and rubber dust).
root_cause: Splice joint cut and joined at a slight diagonal angle (`slight` improper squareness during belt lacing/vulcanizing), causing rhythmic mistracking every belt revolution.
action_taken: Scraped caked debris from drive and tail pulleys, adjusted gravity take-up counterweight guides (`0.011 clearance`), realigned troughing idler brackets, and verified straight tracking across all zones.
parts_used: Training Idler Set, Idler Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`6.3 ft` length) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute. High load demand from driven equipment (MOTOR-601) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`53%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`109°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`1.4 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Drive motor drawing continuous `84` Amps (`115%` rating). Gearbox output shaft rotating sluggishly with noticeable laboring noise (`screeching`).
root_cause: Loss of lagging (`44%` missing) on the drive pulley causing slip. The control system ramps up speed (`49 Hz Hz`) to compensate, overloading the motor.
action_taken: Re-lagged drive pulley (`P/N 2871-REV2`) with diamond tread rubber (`0.19 inch` thick), tightened take-up (`42 ft-lbs` tension), and verified zero slip with tachometer.
parts_used: Ceramic Lagging Strips, Cold Vulcanizing Adhesive, Tensioning Bolts

symptom_description: Ops reported top cover rubber delaminating (`noticeable` separation) and severe edge gouging along `5.6 ft` of conveyor belt carrying surface.
root_cause: Belt slipped off pulley due to misalignment and caught on a rigid structural support (`0.49` stress), tearing the edge.
action_taken: Pulled `1.9 ft` of new belt, performed a hot vulcanized splice (`111°C`), adjusted primary and secondary scrapers, and ran belt unloaded.
parts_used: Conveyor Belt Roll (100ft), Hot Splice Kit, Primary Cleaner Blade

symptom_description: A flap of rubber (`0.23 inch` thick) peeled back on the belt surface, catching on the primary cleaner (`50 Hz` impacts/min).
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`55%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`100°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`4.3 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip

symptom_description: Drive motor drawing continuous `150` Amps (`115%` rating). Gearbox output shaft rotating sluggishly with significant laboring noise (`screeching`).
root_cause: Severe mechanical binding and increased drag (`50 ft-lbs` required) caused by multiple seized idler rollers and caked material dragging against bottom belt return span.
action_taken: Shoveled out heavy material spillage (`3.2 lbs`) burying tail pulley and return belt span, replaced 4 locked-up return idlers (`Spec-675`), refilled fluid coupling with fresh ISO VG 32 oil (`10 lbs gal`), and installed new thermal fuse plug.
parts_used: Replacement Return Idlers (Set of 6), Motor Terminal Lug Kit

symptom_description: High torque alarm active on conveyor drive controller. Motor frame temperature `96`°C (`progressive` overheating). Conveyor struggling to start under load.
root_cause: Tail pulley or take-up assembly jammed with packed solid material (`5.9 lbs`), creating immense frictional drag against belt movement.
action_taken: Cleared mechanical jam inside head pulley discharge chute, re-torqued motor terminal connections (`121 ft-lbs`), checked gearbox oil level, and verified VFD current stability across full speed range (`54 Hz Hz`).
parts_used: Thermal Overload Relay Element, Take-up Slide Lubricant (1 Can), Troughing Idler Rollers (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Longitudinal rip (`6.9 ft` length) gouged into top rubber cover of conveyor belt near loading transfer chute.
root_cause: Mechanical fastener/lacing splice pulled apart (`15%` tension) and caught on fixed belt scraper blade, ripping belt edge open.
action_taken: Performed hot vulcanized splice repair (`110°C`) on torn belt section, removed jammed tramp metal (`4.5 lbs`) from transfer chute, and installed new heavy-duty urethane skirt board sealing strips.
parts_used: Hot Vulcanizing Splice Kit & Gum Rubber, Primary Belt Cleaner Scraper Blade, Urethane Skirt Strip
